name: ship
description: Credentials preflight + full GTM pipeline. Health-check 30+ CLIs/tokens, then execute idea → validate → market → sell → measure.

settings.name: Credentials Directory
settings.description: Absolute path to the directory containing your token files (default: ~/.config/ship/credentials)

settings.name: Credentials Extensions Directory
settings.description: Directory of additional YAML check definitions to merge into the core registry (default: $SHIP_CRED_DIR/extensions)

settings.name: Ship Runs Directory
settings.description: Where ship-engine stores active run state (default: ship-engine/runs/)

settings.name: Linear API Key
settings.description: Linear API key for ship-engine run management
